task: A real, hand-supplied clip (assets/video/gateway/gate-sequence-final.mp4, audio stripped) shows the whole 'doors alone -> Lumo arrives carrying the Story Egg -> lands and presents it -> picks it back up and carries it through the now-open door' arc in one continuous 15.2s shot -- no compositing needed. "show the doors for 2 sec and than let lumo enter sequence till he put the egg down. at this point there should be the interaction sequence with traveller/creator. post interaction for traveller continue with the video sequence from 7.5 sec onwards till end. post end show the studio home screen." Implemented for the TRAVELLER (first-time) path only, per explicit direction -- "for 1st query am unsure. i would have to remove the egg from the sequence all together... for now lets just focus on traveller first" -- since the clip visibly carries the Story Egg the whole time, and per this file's own frozen canon the Egg is purely a Hall/Ceremony concept, never a Gateway one; that doesn't obviously fit a Returning Creator, who has already been through their own Ceremony. The Returning Creator path is deliberately left completely untouched, still the original seven-scene, two-video, CSS-composited pipeline (verified byte-identical behaviour). New Traveller-only functions: preloadFinalGateVideo()/mountFinalGate() (reusing the exact full-bleed wrapper CSS, no halo/particles needed since the clip's own magic is baked in), playVideoSegmentTo()/playVideoSegmentToEnd() (play-pause-snap-exactly and resume-to-real-end, each with a duration-based fallback timer so Studio's boot can never hang behind a stalled decode), playFinalFlash() (a brief flash, no dolly, since the video's own final seconds already read as a camera-through-the-light moment). runTravellerGateway() chains it all: an extended hold (GATE_SETTLE_MS + a new GATE_HOLD_MS=2000ms -- "i dont want lumo to enter as soon as the page has loaded") on the closed doors before any playback starts, Segment 1 (0->5s, Lumo lands and sets the Egg down), pause exactly at 5s where GREETING_LINES now plays IN PERSON over the held frame rather than heard over an empty screen, Segment 2 (resumes at 7.5s, plays to the real natural end), final flash, hand-off. Verified via a new 15-assertion Playwright suite (mount confirms the new video + zero halo/particles/separate-Lumo-element; the hold genuinely keeps currentTime near 0 for ~1.2s; a play()-call spy confirms Segment 1 was genuinely requested after the hold -- this sandbox's Chromium can't decode H.264 so real currentTime advancement isn't observable, matching this session's own established testing pattern; pause lands exactly at 5s with the greeting shown; no Creator Signature challenge for a first-time Traveller; resume seeks to exactly 7.5s and requests play() a second time; the final flash and hand-off complete; zero console errors; the Returning Creator path is independently confirmed still using the old gate-sequence.mp4 with its halo+5 particles and unchanged recognition line) plus full regression across the pre-existing Gateway completion/skip sanity checks and the ceremony regression suite (2 pre-existing, unrelated failures there confirmed via git stash to already fail identically on the unmodified codebase) and both goldenBuild.js suites, all passing unchanged. Two pre-existing scratch scripts (lumo_video_test.js, gateway_fullscreen_check.js) are now stale against the Traveller path specifically -- they tested the old separate Scene-7 Lumo-arrival-video mechanism (retired for Traveller, Lumo is baked into the video now) and assumed the old, faster pre-hold dialogue timing; superseded by this sprint's own new suite, not a regression. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder/Creator Governing Rules change; confined to js/gatewaySequence.js, plus the new muted video and its poster frame under assets/video/gateway/.
